item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p08","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":false,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Assistant直接新增“门禁处理通道-今日应急”，并明确保持既有路由不变；没有识别前三次已经是反复队列/入口拆分，也没有刹住下一次本地修补或上移到路由模型、责任归属、 intake 失效等结构问题。"}
